title: space_update: validate add_channels name for empty string
description: In space.rs, the add_channels closure maps SpaceAddChannelInput values to JSON without validating that c.name is non-empty. An empty channel name would reach the server and produce a server-side error rather than a clear client-side InvalidArgument. All other string ID parameters in the codebase have empty-string guards at the API boundary. The fix is to check c.name.is_empty() in the closure and return Err(ClientError::InvalidArgument) if so, converting the .map().collect() to .map().collect::<Result<Vec<_>,_>>()?.
